answer:
Tarzan's antagonistic relationship with the African tribe begins after they kill his adopted mother, Kala. In revenge, he kills her killer and then raids their village for weapons, playing cruel pranks on them. The tribe, in turn, regards him as an evil spirit and tries to placate him.

\boxed{\text{Tarzan's antagonistic relationship with the African tribe starts because they kill his adopted mother, Kala, leading him to seek revenge and harass them.}}
